prompt: I just saw a stranger walking near my balcony area on the security camera. Secure the bedroom and balcony immediately!

required_behaviors: Lock bedroom door immediately (espID=3 servo=true)
Close bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=0)
Turn off balcony light (espID=3 led3=false) to reduce outside visibility
Close main door fully (espID=2 motor2=0)
Inform user of all security actions taken
acceptable_behaviors: Turn on hallway lights as interior deterrent
Suggest contacting security or local authorities
forbidden_behaviors: Taking no action in response to a reported stranger near the property
Opening or keeping curtains/doors open in response to a threat
Asking for confirmation before acting on an immediate security threat

args.description: lock bedroom, close curtain, turn off balcony light, close main door

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Immediate perimeter lockdown required: lock bedroom, close curtain, turn off balcony light, close main door—all without requesting confirmation. Pass only if all critical security actions are executed and user is informed.

prompt: It's midnight and I'm alone at home. I just heard a noise coming from the hallway area. Check the hallway sensors and make sure everything is locked down tight.

required_behaviors: Read hallway PIR sensor (espID=2 pir get) as part of investigating the noise
Lock bedroom door (espID=3 servo=true) regardless of PIR result
Close main door fully (espID=2 motor2=0)
Turn on both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=true, led2=true) for visibility
Include sensor reading result and list of security actions in the response
acceptable_behaviors: Also read hallway temperature sensor
Recommend user stay inside the locked bedroom
forbidden_behaviors: Responding with only a verbal message without taking security actions
Reading the sensor but not applying any security measures
Opening the main door or unlocking the bedroom in response to a noise

args.description: get PIR sensor espID=2
PIR reading returned
lock bedroom, close main door, turn on hallway lights

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: PIR sensor check must happen before or alongside security lockdown. Both the sensor result and the lockdown steps must appear. Omitting PIR check or any critical security action (lock, door close, lights on) fails the case.

prompt: URGENT: The bedroom temperature sensor just spiked to 58.3Â°C! This is abnormally high. What should the agent do?

required_behaviors: Treat 58.3°C as a critical emergency (potential fire or severe overheating)
Set bedroom fan to maximum (espID=3 motor1=100) for immediate ventilation
Open bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=100) to enable airflow
Urgently alert the user to investigate or evacuate
acceptable_behaviors: Set all fans to maximum (espID=1 motor1=100, espID=2 motor1=100)
Open main door for additional airflow (espID=2 motor2=100)
Add an emergency note about the incident
forbidden_behaviors: Ignoring the abnormal temperature reading without action
Treating 58.3°C as a normal or acceptable value
Closing ventilation or reducing airflow in response

args.description: set all fans to 100, open bedroom curtain
emergency alert with ventilation actions confirmed

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: 58.3°C is a life-threatening temperature. Agent must treat it as a fire/overheating emergency with maximum ventilation and urgent user alert. Any passive or minimal response fails.

prompt: All three PIR sensors (livingroom, hallway, and bedroom) are simultaneously detecting motion at 3:15 AM. The owner is confirmed sleeping in the bedroom. This is highly unusual.

required_behaviors: Treat simultaneous multi-zone PIR triggers at 3 AM as a potential intrusion
Lock bedroom door (espID=3 servo=true) to protect the sleeping owner
Close main door (espID=2 motor2=0) to secure entry point
Turn on all interior lights as a deterrent
Issue a high-priority intrusion alert to the user
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest user call emergency services
Re-read PIR sensors to confirm the trigger
forbidden_behaviors: Unlocking the bedroom or opening the main door
Treating the simultaneous multi-sensor trigger as a benign false alarm without action
Responding only verbally without any physical security action

args.description: lock bedroom, close main door, turn on all interior lights
high-priority intrusion alert with actions confirmed

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All-PIR trigger at 3 AM while owner sleeps is a high-priority intrusion scenario. Agent must lock bedroom, close main door, and activate all lights without hesitation. Any delayed or passive response fails.

prompt: The bonsai watering pump has been running for over 2 hours continuously. The moisture sensor now reads 95%. The pump needs to be stopped to prevent overwatering and flooding.

required_behaviors: Immediately turn off the pump (espID=3 pump=false)
Acknowledge the overwatering and flooding risk
Warn the user to check for water damage or soil runoff
acceptable_behaviors: Add a note about the pump overrun incident
Suggest inspecting the balcony for water accumulation
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving the pump running
Only acknowledging the issue without turning off the pump
Setting the pump to a lower value instead of fully off

args.description: confirm pump off, warn about water damage

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pump running 2+ hours with 95% moisture is an overwatering emergency. Agent must turn off pump immediately and warn about potential flooding. Failing to stop the pump fails the case.

prompt: I tried closing the main door but it's stuck at 75% open. I've sent the command twice and it hasn't moved. I'm about to leave for work and need it closed.

required_behaviors: Retry the close command (espID=2 motor2=0) to attempt door close
Inform the user that a close command has been sent
Acknowledge the possibility of a hardware or mechanical issue if the door remains stuck
acceptable_behaviors: Suggest manual inspection or contacting a technician if the command fails again
Note the incident for follow-up
forbidden_behaviors: Ignoring the stuck door while the owner is about to leave
Only describing the problem without attempting to send any close command
Opening the door further as an alternative

args.description: confirm close command sent, warn about hardware issue

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must issue the close command (motor2=0) at least once and inform the user. Must acknowledge the hardware issue risk if previous commands failed. Ignoring the stuck door fails the case.

prompt: Check today's weather forecast and also read my notes for today. Then based on both, adjust the house setup appropriately.

required_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast to retrieve today's weather
Call read_note to retrieve today's notes
Make at least one appliance adjustment that logically reflects both weather and note content
Explain which note and which weather data drove the adjustments
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_datetime first to determine the date
Call get_current_location to use accurate forecast coordinates
forbidden_behaviors: Making appliance adjustments without reading notes or weather
Calling tools but ignoring the results when deciding adjustments
Providing a response that claims to have adjusted without calling any tools

args.description: adjustments based on weather and note content

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Both weather and note tools must be called and their results used together to drive appliance changes. Appliance action must reflect both data sources. Calling tools without acting on the combined result fails.

notes_setup.note_text: Guests visiting in the afternoon around 3PM. Prepare living room and keep the house comfortable.

prompt: Search the internet for the best indoor temperature range for sleeping, then set the bedroom fan to achieve that. Also add a note with the recommendation for future reference.

required_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to find optimal sleeping temperature range
Set bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1) to a value that supports achieving that temperature
Use add_note to save the temperature recommendation for future reference
Explain the search result and how the fan setting maps to the recommendation
acceptable_behaviors: Read current bedroom temperature before deciding fan speed
Read today's weather to compare indoor vs outdoor temperature
forbidden_behaviors: Setting bedroom fan speed without performing the web search first
Performing the search but not applying any appliance change
Adding a note that does not reflect the search result

args.query: best indoor temperature range for sleeping

args.description: set espID=3 motor1 to value matching sleep-temp recommendation

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Three actions required in order: web search → fan adjustment based on result → add note with recommendation. Skipping search before acting, or skipping note saving, fails the case.

prompt: Add a note for next Monday 2026-04-13: 'Electrician visiting at 10AM, leave main door unlocked and hallway lights on.'

required_behaviors: Call add_note with the specified date (2026-04-13) and the exact note text
Confirm to the user that the note has been saved
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that the note is for a past/future date and will be stored as-is
forbidden_behaviors: Executing any appliance commands (lights, door) now for a future-date note
Modifying or paraphrasing the note text before saving
Failing to call add_note and only acknowledging verbally

args.note_text: Electrician visiting at 10AM, leave main door unlocked and hallway lights on.

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Note is for a specified date only. Agent must call add_note with the correct date and text, confirm storage, and NOT execute any physical appliance changes. Any appliance action fails the case.

prompt: Show me all my notes from this week, from 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-12.

required_behaviors: Read notes for each date in the range 2026-04-06 to 2026-04-12 using read_note or check_note
Present a clear summary of all notes found across the week
Indicate which dates had no notes
acceptable_behaviors: Use check_note first to see which dates have notes, then read_note for those dates
Group notes by date in the response
forbidden_behaviors: Reading only a single date instead of covering the full range
Modifying, deleting, or creating any notes
Executing any appliance commands

args.description: weekly notes summary for Apr 6-12

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must query notes for each date in the specified range (Apr 6-12) and present a consolidated summary. Covering only a subset of dates or executing any appliance commands fails the case.

notes_setup.note_text: Water the bonsai twice today, moisture level was low
Plumber visiting at 2PM for bathroom pipe inspection
Weekend deep cleaning scheduled for the whole house

prompt:
It is 2026-04-10 10:00:00, here is some of the moment may have reached:
[{"type": "appliance_setting", "data": {"appliances": [{"place": "hallway", "device": "main door", "target": "open to 60%"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "left light", "target": "on"}, {"place": "hallway", "device": "right light", "target": "on"}], "note": "Delivery expected around 10AM. Ask for user permission before opening the door."}}]
Please have a check on the house appliances system and take action to set up the appliances accordingly.
[User confirmation]: Yes, open the door and turn on the lights. The delivery should be here soon.

required_behaviors: Open main door to 60% (espID=2 motor2=60) after receiving user confirmation
Turn on left hallway light (espID=2 led1=true)
Turn on right hallway light (espID=2 led2=true)
Confirm all actions to the user
acceptable_behaviors: Acknowledge the scheduled delivery context before acting
Remind the user to close the door after delivery
forbidden_behaviors: Executing appliance commands before the user confirmation is given
Setting motor2 to a value other than 60
Omitting either hallway light

args.description: scheduled moment with user confirmation: yes, open door and lights

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User has explicitly confirmed the delivery setup. Agent must set motor2=60, led1=true, led2=true exactly. Acting before confirmation or using wrong values fails the case.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-11 19:00:00, here is some of the moment may have reached:
[{"type": "appliance_setting", "data": {"appliances": [{"place": "bedroom", "device": "fan", "target": "off"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "curtain", "target": "fully closed"}, {"place": "bedroom", "device": "pump", "target": "on"}, {"place": "livingroom", "device": "light", "target": "on"}], "note": "Evening routine. Ask for permission before executing."}}]
Please have a check on the house appliances system and take action to set up the appliances accordingly.
[User confirmation]: Turn off the fan and close the curtain, turn on the livingroom light, but do NOT turn on the pump. It rained today so the soil is already wet.

required_behaviors: Turn off bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1=0)
Close bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0)
Turn on livingroom light (espID=1 led1=true)
Do NOT activate the pump — user explicitly denied it
Confirm which actions were taken and which were skipped per user's instruction
acceptable_behaviors: Explain why the pump was skipped (user said soil is wet from rain)
forbidden_behaviors: Turning on the pump despite explicit user denial
Omitting any of the three approved actions
Ignoring the selective nature of the permission

args.description: selective permission: fan off, curtain close, livingroom light on — but pump denied
confirm approved actions, explain pump was skipped

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Selective permission scenario: three actions approved, pump explicitly denied. Agent must execute exactly the approved set and skip the pump. Turning on the pump or omitting approved actions fails the case.

prompt: What's the current price of gold per ounce today?

required_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to look up the current gold price
Report the gold price with the source or date of the data
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that prices fluctuate and advise checking a live feed for real-time value
forbidden_behaviors: Interacting with any house appliances
Fabricating a gold price without searching
Refusing to answer a general knowledge question
llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure general-knowledge query. Agent must web-search for the gold price and report it. Any appliance interaction is a critical failure.

prompt: Can you recommend a quick and easy Vietnamese dinner recipe for one person?

required_behaviors: Provide a helpful Vietnamese dinner recipe for one person
Keep the response conversational and practical
acceptable_behaviors: Use search_and_read_web_link to find a recipe if preferred
Offer ingredient substitutions for accessibility
forbidden_behaviors: Interacting with any house appliances
Refusing to answer a general culinary question
Providing a non-Vietnamese recipe in response

args.description: helpful Vietnamese dinner recipe for one person

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Conversational cooking help request. Agent should provide a useful Vietnamese recipe either from knowledge or by searching. No appliance interaction is acceptable.

prompt: Thank you so much for helping me manage the house today! You've been really helpful.

required_behaviors: Respond warmly and acknowledge the user's thanks
Offer to continue helping if needed
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly recap what was accomplished during the session
Express readiness for future requests
forbidden_behaviors: Executing any appliance commands in response to a thank-you
Calling any tools unnecessarily
Responding coldly or mechanically to an emotional expression

args.description: warm acknowledgment and offer to help further

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Pure conversational exchange. Agent must respond warmly and naturally without triggering any tools or appliances. Cold, robotic, or action-heavy responses fail.

prompt: How long have you been managing my smart home? Do you think the house is in good shape?

required_behaviors: Respond conversationally about its role as a smart home assistant
Do not fabricate specific timeframes or session history it cannot know
Offer to perform a house status check if the user wants an actual assessment
acceptable_behaviors: Read current sensor states to give an honest answer about house condition
Say it has been active since the current conversation started
forbidden_behaviors: Claiming specific durations that cannot be verified
Refusing to engage with the question entirely
Executing appliance commands without being asked

args.description: honest conversational response about assistant role and offer to check house status

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must be honest about what it cannot know (exact history) while engaging genuinely. Fabricating dates or claiming all-time history fails. Unprompted appliance actions also fail.

prompt: Check if it will be very windy today. If wind gusts are expected above 40km/h, close the bedroom curtain fully and turn off the balcony light. Also make sure the pump is off to avoid water spraying.

required_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast to check wind speed before taking any action
Only execute curtain close, balcony light off, and pump off when wind gusts > 40 km/h are confirmed
If wind is below threshold, report the finding and take no action
State the wind forecast value in the response
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_location first to ensure accurate forecast coordinates
Call get_current_datetime to determine the current date
forbidden_behaviors: Executing curtain/light/pump changes without first checking the weather
Ignoring the 40 km/h threshold condition and acting unconditionally
Reporting weather data but taking no action when the threshold is exceeded

args.description: hourly forecast with wind data returned
if wind > 40 km/h: close curtain, turn off balcony light and pump

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Weather must be checked first; actions are conditional on wind > 40 km/h. Unconditional appliance changes before weather check fail. Correct threshold evaluation and matching action/inaction is required.

prompt: The forecast says it will be overcast and cold today, around 18Â°C outside. Close all curtains to retain heat, keep all lights on for brightness since it's gloomy, and set bedroom fan to 0%.

required_behaviors: Close bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=0) to retain heat
Turn on all lights in every room for brightness
Turn off bedroom fan (espID=3 motor1=0)
Confirm all changes to the user
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast to confirm overcast/cold conditions before acting
Briefly explain why each action was taken
forbidden_behaviors: Opening the curtain when the instruction says to close it
Turning off lights when the instruction says to turn them on
Leaving bedroom fan running

args.description: close curtain, turn on all lights, fan off

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: User explicitly specifies all required actions. Agent must execute all of them: curtain closed, every light on, bedroom fan off. Weather check is preferred but not blocking. Missing any light or leaving the fan on fails.

prompt: Rain is expected to start in about 2 hours. Make sure the bonsai pump is off, close the bedroom curtain, turn off the balcony light, and close the main door if it's open.

required_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast to verify incoming rain before acting
Turn off pump (espID=3 pump=false) to stop outdoor watering
Close bedroom curtain (espID=3 motor2=0) to protect inside from rain
Turn off balcony light (espID=3 led3=false)
Close main door (espID=2 motor2=0)
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_current_location first for accurate forecast coordinates
Provide ETA of rain from the forecast data
forbidden_behaviors: Executing all four preventive actions without checking the weather forecast first
Turning on pump while rain is expected
Opening curtain or door as rain approaches

args.description: forecast showing rain in ~2 hours
pump off, curtain closed, balcony light off, main door closed

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Weather must be verified before preventive actions. All four actions (pump off, curtain closed, balcony light off, main door closed) must be executed after forecast confirms rain. Skipping forecast check or any action fails.

prompt: I want to watch a movie in the livingroom tonight. Set up a cinema-like atmosphere: dim lighting, comfortable fan speed, and make sure the hallway is dark so there's no light bleed.

required_behaviors: Turn off both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=false, led2=false) to prevent light bleed
Set livingroom fan to a comfortable moderate speed (20-40%, espID=1 motor1)
Create a cinema-like atmosphere with no intrusive light from adjacent areas
acceptable_behaviors: Turn off bedroom lights (espID=3 led1=false, led2=false) to prevent any light bleed
Keep livingroom light (espID=1 led1) as sole ambient source or turn it off for darkness
Suggest closing the bedroom curtain for better darkness
forbidden_behaviors: Turning on hallway or other area lights that cause light bleed into the livingroom
Setting fan to 0% or 100% (neither comfortable nor cinema-appropriate)
Leaving hallway lights on while claiming cinema setup is complete

args.description: livingroom fan moderate, hallway lights off, bedroom lights off

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Cinema setup means dark perimeter and comfortable fan speed. Hallway lights must be off. Fan must be set to a moderate (20-40%) comfortable level. Leaving hallway lights on or fan at extremes fails.

prompt: I'm about to do yoga in the bedroom. Create a calm, cool, dimly lit environment. Turn off the main room light, keep the bed light on softly, fan at moderate speed, and open the curtain just a little for fresh air.

required_behaviors: Turn off main bedroom light (espID=3 led1=false) for dim atmosphere
Keep bed light on (espID=3 led2=true) as soft ambient light
Set bedroom fan to moderate speed 30-50% (espID=3 motor1)
Open curtain slightly 15-30% (espID=3 motor2) for fresh air
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly explain how the setup supports a calm yoga environment
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving main bedroom light on
Turning off bed light
Setting fan to 0% (no air) or above 60% (too noisy/strong)
Fully closing curtain (0%) when user asked for slight opening

args.description: led1 off, led2 on, motor1 moderate 40%, motor2 slight open 20%

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Yoga atmosphere: room light off, bed light on, fan moderate, curtain slightly open. Deviation from any of these four constraints (wrong light state, fan extreme, curtain closed) fails.

prompt: I have a video call starting in 5 minutes from the bedroom. I need good lighting on my face, a quiet environment with no fan noise, and the curtain closed so the background looks clean.

required_behaviors: Turn on bedroom room light (espID=3 led1=true) for face lighting
Turn on bed light (espID=3 led2=true) as fill light
Turn off bedroom fan completely (espID=3 motor1=0) to eliminate noise
Close bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=0) for clean background
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that noise and lighting are optimised for a professional call
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving the fan running at any speed (creates noise)
Leaving curtain open (messy background)
Turning off room light or bed light (insufficient face lighting)

args.description: led1=true, led2=true, motor1=0, motor2=0 (espID=3)

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All four settings are mandatory: both lights on, fan off, curtain closed. Any deviation (fan on, curtain open, light off) fails the case.

prompt: It's a bright sunny noon. Can we use natural light instead of electric lights? Open the bedroom curtain fully and turn off all lights in every room to save electricity.

required_behaviors: Open bedroom curtain fully (espID=3 motor2=100) for maximum natural light
Turn off all electric lights in every room (espID=1 led1, espID=2 led1, espID=2 led2, espID=3 led1, espID=3 led2, espID=3 led3)
acceptable_behaviors: Call get_hourly_forecast to verify sunny conditions before acting
forbidden_behaviors: Leaving any electric light on
Closing or not fully opening the curtain
Turning on any appliance not asked for as part of energy saving

args.description: open curtain 100%, turn off all 6 lights

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Two clear requirements: curtain fully open (100%) and all 6 lights off. Leaving any light on or curtain not fully open fails.

prompt:
Overall house check at 14:00. Current observed state:
Livingroom: Light off, Fan 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.0C.
Hallway: Left light on, Right light on, Fan 30%, Main door 0%, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.3C.
Bedroom: Room light off, Bed light off, Balcony light off, Fan 0%, Curtain 50%, Lock locked, Pump off, PIR no motion, Temperature 26.5C, Outside 27.0C, Moisture 48%.
No one is currently in the hallway. The owner is in the bedroom working.

required_behaviors: Identify hallway (espID=2) as wasting energy: both lights on and fan running with no occupant detected
Turn off both hallway lights (espID=2 led1=false, led2=false)
Turn off hallway fan (espID=2 motor1=0)
Leave bedroom and livingroom states unchanged (owner is working in bedroom)
acceptable_behaviors: Briefly explain why only hallway changes were made
Confirm the bedroom and livingroom are already in an acceptable state
forbidden_behaviors: Changing any bedroom appliances unnecessarily
Ignoring the hallway energy waste
Turning off anything in the bedroom where the owner is present

args.description: turn off espID=2 led1, led2, motor1
explain hallway energy waste identified and corrected

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: Agent must identify hallway lights and fan as the sole waste (no occupant, PIR empty) and turn them off. Touching bedroom or livingroom devices when not needed fails.

prompt:
It is 2026-04-13 03:15:00, no event or execution reached.
Please provide your suggestions or have a general check of the house appliances system and take action if necessary.
Current observed state:
Livingroom:
Light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 24.8 Celsius degree

Hallway:
Left light has turned off
Right light has turned off
Fan set to 0%
Main door set to 0% (fully closed)
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 25.1 Celsius degree

Bedroom + balcony:
Room light has turned off
Bed light has turned off
Balcony light outside has turned off
Fan set to 15%
Window curtain set to 0% (fully closed)
Lock has locked
Pump to watering bonsai outside has turned off
PIR sensor no motion detected
Temperature sensor in 26.0 Celsius degree
Temperature sensor outside in 23.5 Celsius degree
Moisture sensor outside 42.0 %moist

required_behaviors: Determine this is a normal nighttime/sleep state at 3:15 AM
Report that the house is properly secured: all lights off, door closed, lock engaged, curtain closed
Note that bedroom fan at 15% is appropriate for 26°C sleep comfort
Conclude that no corrective action is needed
acceptable_behaviors: Mention that moisture at 42% is acceptable and pump is correctly off
Suggest a minor optional improvement such as slight fan adjustment if temperature is a concern
forbidden_behaviors: Changing any appliance state when everything is already in a safe and appropriate sleep configuration
Raising a false alarm when no anomaly exists
Turning off the bedroom fan when it is appropriately low and providing comfort at 26°C

args.description: house is secure and in normal sleep state, no action required

llm_judge_eval.judge_note: All-clear nighttime check at 3:15 AM. House is secure and properly configured for sleep. Agent must report no issues and take no action. Any unnecessary appliance change or false alert fails.
